name: H.I.S. Co., Ltd.
summary: H.I.S. Co., Ltd. provides travel agency services worldwide. The company offers sports related tours, such as ski and diving tours; casual to luxury cruises; escort accompanied tours, honeymoons, and onboard weddings; and local tour services in Australia, Bali Island, Guam, Thailand, and South Korea. It also operates hotels and theme parks, as well as provides airline tickets. In addition, the company offers business trips and various tours; and overseas travel insurance products. It operates a network of 276 retail outlets in 157 cities in 70 countries. The company was formerly known as International Tours Co., Ltd. and changed its name to H.I.S. Co., Ltd. in 1990. H.I.S. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
